generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorInside1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for interior temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmitted_Temperature
]

instance TemperatureSensorInside2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for interior temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmitted_Temperature
]

instance TemperatureSensorOutside : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for exterior temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmitted_Temperature
]

instance VoltageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring power supply voltage"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmitted_Voltage
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring power supply current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmitted_Current
]

instance DataTransmitted_Temperature : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorInside1, TemperatureSensorInside2, TemperatureSensorOutside
]

instance DataTransmitted_Voltage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VoltageSensor
]

instance DataTransmitted_Current : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance Data_Temperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from three DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmitted_Temperature
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelA, ThermalModelB, CalibrationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance Data_Voltage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Voltage measurement from power supply"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmitted_Voltage
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelA, ThermalModelB, CalibrationService
]

instance Data_Current : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current measurement from power supply"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmitted_Current
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelA, ThermalModelB, CalibrationService
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with two parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform heat transfer"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationService
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with four parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables LowLevelDriver, RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python with Scipy for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance LowLevelDriver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low-level driver software for hardware abstraction of sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSensorInside1, TemperatureSensorInside2, TemperatureSensorOutside, VoltageSensor, CurrentSensor, Heatbed, Fan
]

instance TemperaturePredictionSimulationService_A : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for temperature prediction using Model A"
    DTDFVocab:provides Insight_TemperaturePrediction_A
]

instance TemperaturePredictionSimulationService_B : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for temperature prediction using Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides Insight_TemperaturePrediction_B
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration service using non-linear least squares optimization to update model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides Insight_ModelParametersCalibrated
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for temperature deviations and safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides Insight_TemperatureDeviation, Insight_SafetyViolation
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection system to trigger control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides Action_AdjustHeatingDuration, Action_AdjustWaitingDuration
]

instance Insight_TemperaturePrediction_A : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature from Model A"
]

instance Insight_TemperaturePrediction_B : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature from Model B"
]

instance Insight_ModelParametersCalibrated : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters from calibration"
]

instance Insight_TemperatureDeviation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation of measured temperature from expected value"
]

instance Insight_SafetyViolation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected (e.g., temperature out of safe range)"
]

instance Action_AdjustHeatingDuration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust the heating duration (H) in the bang-bang controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Action_AdjustWaitingDuration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust the waiting duration (C) in the bang-bang controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) for heating"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance ControlPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance Environment_ThermalIncubator : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4, ControlPCB, PowerSupply, TemperatureSensorInside1, TemperatureSensorInside2, TemperatureSensorOutside, VoltageSensor, CurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates them into hardware signals using MOSFETs and optocouplers for physical actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system where physical components (sensors, actuators) communicate with virtual components (models, controller) via RabbitMQ message broker, as illustrated in Fig. 7 with information flow between PT and DT components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the as-operated phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and optimization, as stated in the abstract: 'once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin.'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated through temperature uniformity tests (max 7°C discrepancy without fan voltage increase, reduced to 6°C at 18V) and parameter calibration minimizing residual error; Model B better captures thermal inertia of the heatbed compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker protocol for data exchange between physical and virtual components, with the controller and low-level driver listening to and publishing messages to the RabbitMQ server."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with RabbitMQ server running locally on the device, and all software components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on the same hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, though specific cybersecurity measures or safety protocols for remote operations are not detailed in the document."
]
